message:
perf(indexer): defer WAL checkpoints and Tantivy updates during bulk imports; add fast schema probe to bypass recovery path

WAL checkpoint deferral:
- Add defer_checkpoints flag (true for non-watch mode, false for watch)
  that sets PRAGMA wal_autocheckpoint=0 during bulk import operations.
  WAL checkpointing is expensive and unnecessary while thousands of
  conversations are being ingested — the OS will checkpoint on close or
  when cass finishes. In watch mode checkpoints remain at 1000 pages to
  keep the WAL from growing unboundedly.
- New apply_index_writer_checkpoint_policy() helper applied alongside
  apply_index_writer_busy_timeout() at all 5 storage (re)open sites
- New index_writer_wal_autocheckpoint_pages() config function with
  CASS_INDEX_WRITER_WAL_AUTOCHECKPOINT_PAGES env var override
- Thread defer_checkpoints through ingest_batch →
  persist_conversations_batched → persist_conversations_batched_begin_concurrent
  → apply_begin_concurrent_writer_tuning

Deferred Tantivy updates:
- Add defer_lexical_updates_enabled() flag (CASS_DEFER_LEXICAL_UPDATES
  env var) that skips all t_index.add_messages() calls during import.
  For historical reconciliation workflows that only need the SQLite DB
  populated, this eliminates the Tantivy write amplification entirely.
  A subsequent cass index --full rebuilds the Tantivy index from the
  now-complete DB.
- Guarded in 3 ingest paths: begin_concurrent, serial batched, and
  single-conversation insert

Fast schema probe:
- Add current_schema_fast_probe() that opens a lightweight
  FrankenConnection, reads meta.schema_version, and returns true if it
  matches CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION. When true, open_storage_for_index()
  calls FrankenStorage::open() directly, bypassing the expensive
  open_or_rebuild() recovery path with its rusqlite fallback probes.
  Falls back to the full recovery path on any error.
- Improved error formatting in the fallback path ({err:#} for full
  context chain)

New tests:
- wal_autocheckpoint_defaults_follow_bulk_import_mode
- defer_lexical_updates_flag_parsing
- apply_index_writer_checkpoint_policy_round_trips_pragma
- current_schema_fast_probe_accepts_current_schema
- current_schema_fast_probe_rejects_future_schema_marker

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
